Experiential Spaces

Dubai Design Week 2024

2024
Client Hind ALoud
Region Dubai Design Week, UAE
Year 2024
Sector Experiential Spaces

Experiential Pop-Up | Artistic Installation | Brand Activation

When Scent Becomes Art

At Dubai Design Week, Hind Al-Oud presented an immersive pop-up installation that transformed fragrance into art and poetry into space. Inspired by Kibriya’E by poet Faisal Al-Adwani, the activation introduced two exclusive perfumes — Alifi and Ya’E — expressed as a multi-sensory journey from certainty to singularity, blending scent, light, sound, and spatial storytelling into an evocative design experience.
Next Project
